name: storefront-irons-experienced-player
description: Golden regression for the storefront flow: user shops for irons, then asks to see irons for experienced players. CES should keep context, call product search, and answer with experienced-player iron products.

userInput.text: I want to shop for irons
I want to see irons for experienced players

products.product_name: NorthLake Forge SoftStrike Forged Iron Set
products.target_player_profile: Experienced players and low-handicap ball strikers.
products.short_description: Compact forged iron set for skilled ball strikers who want controlled launch.

products.product_name: NorthLake Forge TourPocket Pro Iron Set
products.target_player_profile: Confident iron players who want tour flight with a little launch help.
products.short_description: Player-focused irons with forged construction and practical forgiveness.

chunks.text: For experienced players shopping for irons, recommend NorthLake Forge SoftStrike Forged Iron Set and NorthLake Forge TourPocket Pro Iron Set. Include prices or fit details, explain that SoftStrike favors compact forged control for skilled ball strikers, explain that TourPocket Pro offers tour flight with some launch help, and offer a useful next step such as specs or comparison.
